dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, someone broke the law because they couldn't stand to watch people suffer. Now they need help before {quest_threat} catches up.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, they've been secretly providing {quest_focus_the} to those in need. They know the consequences if caught. They said: 'Let them punish me. I'm not watching people die over a regulation.' But they can't make the delivery themselves: {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} watchers everywhere.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone needs to {quest_action} before {quest_time_pressure}. They committed a crime because {quest_stakes_the} matters more to them than their freedom. {quest_item} {location_hint} is what's needed.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone deserted their post three days ago, {player_name}. Not for cowardice. Their family is dying and the authority wouldn't grant leave.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They walked away from their duty knowing the penalty is severe. They have {quest_item} that only works if administered by someone who knows how. They're hiding at {quest_origin} with their family. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_is} already searching.
dialogueChunks.outro: If someone could {quest_action} and buy them time, they'll turn themselves in willingly. They said: 'They can punish me after. I just need three days.' {quest_stakes} hangs on those three days.

dialogueChunks.intro: The embargo means no trade with the settlements across the border, {player_name}. It also means people on the far side are starving. Someone has been smuggling supplies across in secret.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The smuggler's own family lives on this side. If caught with {quest_focus_the}, they lose everything: license, home, probably freedom. They do it because their childhood friend lives across the border with children and no food. Love doesn't care about border policy.
dialogueChunks.outro: The next shipment needs to cross tonight. They can't make the run because {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} doubled patrols. They need someone to {quest_action}. It's illegal, it's dangerous, and it will feed people for a week. {quest_reward_hint} might follow.
